user_prompt: Can you rephrase that last response in a warmer tone?
actual_output:
I'd be happy to help with that! Since you didn't specify which response you'd like me to adjust, I'll provide a warmer version of the "I can't log in" example.

***

**Draft response (Warmer Tone):**

Hi Sarah,

I am so sorry to hear you're having trouble logging in—I know how frustrating it is to be locked out, especially after trying to reset your password a few times. I'm here to help you get this sorted out right away.

Here is what we can try:

1. I’ve just triggered a manual password reset link to your email (sarah@company.com).
2. If you don't see it in your inbox within a couple of minutes, would you mind checking your spam folder? Sometimes those automated emails like to hide there!
3. It can also help to try logging in through an incognito or private browser window, just to make sure your browser isn't holding onto any old, cached information.

If that still doesn't do the trick, please let me know! I can set a temporary password for you manually so you can get back into your account without any more hassle.

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team

***

Does this feel more like the tone you were looking for? If you had a different ticket in mind, just paste it here and I'll be happy to rewrite it for you!
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the user's request to adjust its tone and provided a helpful, warmer example of a support response while staying within its defined persona.
